title: Reinstate showing Updates view when speech bubble is clicked
excerpt: Before last month, clicking the item speech bubble defaulted to the Updates view on the item page and clicking ‘Open item page’ defaulted to the Overview view. Now, clicking the item speech bubble defaults to the Overvie…

posts.author: vvollmar (Vicari Vollmar)
posts.cookedHtml: Before last month, clicking the item speech bubble defaulted to the Updates view on the item page and clicking ‘Open item page’ defaulted to the Overview view. Now, clicking the item speech bubble defaults to the Overview view instead of the Updates view, and it’s inconvenient. Can you reinstate the previous functionality so clicking each icon takes you to the corresponding view?
